basic_details.job_title: CCRAS RARI Yoga Therapist Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: CCRAS Regional Ayurveda Research Institute (CCRAS RARI) Yoga Therapist Notification 2026 has been released for the recruitment of Yoga Therapist posts at CCRAS RARI. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CCRAS RARI Yoga Therapist Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy with minimum 55% marks and two years experience, Graduate with one year diploma in Yoga with 55% marks and five years experience, Level II (Therapy Level) Certificate of YCB
qualification.details: Yoga Therapist: Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy with a minimum of 55% marks from a recognized University and two years experience in Yoga Therapy in a reputed Institute/Hospital OR Any Graduate from a recognized University established under UGC Act with diploma in Yoga after graduation of at least One year duration from a recognized University/ Institute with 55% marks and practical experience in Yoga in a reputed Yoga Institute/ Hospital for a minimum period of five years. Level II (Therapy Level) Certificate of YCB. Demonstration skills in Yogic practices for which skill test will be conducted.

selection_process: Written Test Skill Test Document Verification

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the CCRAS RARI recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the CCRAS RARI recruitment is Yoga Therapist. This is a contractual position with one vacancy available.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Yoga Therapist post is scheduled for 16 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Yoga Therapist post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy with 55% marks and two years of experience, or a Graduate with a one-year diploma in Yoga (55% marks) and five years of experience, along with a Level II (Therapy Level) Certificate of YCB.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Yoga Therapist position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Yoga Therapist position will receive a salary of Rs. 38000 Per Month.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Yoga Therapist post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Yoga Therapist post at CCRAS Regional Ayurveda Research Institute.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Yoga Therapist role?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test, a Skill Test, and Document Verification. Candidates must perform well in all stages.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled to be held in Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala. The exact venue address will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs. This includes ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates.
